_provenance: Claude-authored original Zhongkao-level 语法填空 (gblanks shape, 10 blanks each), batch G2. Topics distinct from G1; points rotate over tense/preposition/article/pronoun/comparative-superlative/word-form/connector/subject-verb agreement/non-finite. Dialogue single-quoted. DeepSeek not used.

sets.passage: My best friend Tom and I (1)____ (know) each other since primary school. He is taller than me, but I run (2)____ (fast) than him. We share many hobbies, (3)____ playing basketball is our favourite. Every weekend we meet (4)____ the park to practise together. Last month, our team won a match, and Tom scored the (5)____ (high) point of the game. After that, the coach said we (6)____ (be) the future of the team. I felt very proud (7)____ him. A good friend is someone (8)____ stands by you in hard times. Tom always helps me (9)____ (solve) my problems. I hope our friendship will last (10)____ (forever).
sets.explain_zh: (1) since 现在完成 have known；(2) faster 比较级；(3) 并列 and；(4) in the park；(5) highest 最高级；(6) we were 过去；(7) proud of；(8) who/that 指人；(9) help sb (to) solve；(10) forever 副词。

sets.passage: Yesterday our teacher gave us an interesting (1)____ (lesson) about the environment. She told us that the earth (2)____ (be) our only home, so we must protect it. We learned that plastic bags are bad (3)____ nature. If everyone uses fewer of (4)____, the world will become cleaner. The teacher showed us a video, and it was (5)____ (move) that some students almost cried. She asked us (6)____ (turn) off the lights when we leave a room. I think saving water is (7)____ (important) than wasting it. From now on, I (8)____ ride a bike to school instead of taking a car. Small actions can make (9)____ big difference. We should all do (10)____ (we) best to keep the earth green.
sets.explain_zh: (1) an interesting lesson 单数；(2) the earth is 一般真理；(3) bad for；(4) fewer of them 宾格；(5) so moving that 形容词+so...that；(6) ask sb to turn；(7) more important 比较级；(8) from now on 将来 will；(9) make a difference；(10) do our best。

sets.passage: When I was a child, I was afraid (1)____ the dark. Every night I asked my mother (2)____ (stay) with me until I fell asleep. One evening, she gave me a small lamp (3)____ shone like a star. 'You are braver than you think,' she said (4)____ a gentle smile. Slowly, I learned to sleep alone, and the fear (5)____ (disappear). Now I am thirteen, and I am no longer (6)____ (afraid) of anything in the dark. I understand that growing up means facing our fears (7)____ ourselves. My mother often tells me that courage (8)____ (come) from inside. I am thankful for everything she (9)____ (teach) me. She is the (10)____ (good) mother in the world.
sets.explain_zh: (1) afraid of；(2) ask sb to stay；(3) that/which 指物；(4) with a smile；(5) 过去 disappeared；(6) afraid 形容词；(7) by ourselves；(8) courage comes 主谓一致；(9) has taught 现在完成；(10) the best 最高级。

sets.passage: Our city has changed a lot in the past ten years. Twenty years ago, there (1)____ only a few tall buildings here. Now there are hundreds of (2)____ (they), and the streets are much (3)____ (wide) than before. People can travel around (4)____ (easy) by subway. The air is cleaner because many trees (5)____ (plant) along the roads. My grandparents say that life today is more convenient (6)____ it was in their youth. Last year, a beautiful park (7)____ (build) near my home. Every evening, families go there (8)____ (relax) after work. I am proud of my city, and I believe it will become even (9)____ (beautiful) in the future. We should all work hard to make (10)____ a better place.
sets.explain_zh: (1) there were 过去；(2) hundreds of them 宾格；(3) wider 比较级；(4) easily 副词；(5) trees have been planted 现在完成被动；(6) more...than；(7) was built 过去被动；(8) to relax 目的；(9) more beautiful 比较级；(10) make it 宾格。

sets.passage: Reading is one of the best (1)____ (way) to learn about the world. My father, (2)____ is a teacher, often buys me new books. He says that a good book (3)____ (be) like a good friend. Last winter, I read a story (4)____ a brave girl who saved her village. It was so exciting (5)____ I finished it in one day. Since then, I have read more (6)____ thirty books. Reading helps me think (7)____ (deep) and write better essays. My teacher says my writing has improved (8)____ (great) this term. I usually read for an hour (9)____ I go to bed. Books have opened a window (10)____ a wider world for me.
sets.explain_zh: (1) one of the best ways 复数；(2) who 指人；(3) a good book is 主谓一致；(4) a story about；(5) so...that；(6) more than；(7) think more deeply 比较级副词；(8) greatly 副词；(9) before I go to bed；(10) a window to a world。

sets.passage: Sports are very important (1)____ our health. At our school, students must do exercise (2)____ (regular). My favourite sport is swimming, (3)____ I started when I was seven. I think it is (4)____ (relax) and good for the whole body. My brother prefers running, and he runs (5)____ (fast) than anyone in his class. Last term, our school (6)____ (hold) a sports meeting. Many parents came (7)____ (watch) their children compete. The most exciting moment was the relay race, (8)____ our class won. After the race, everyone was tired but (9)____ (happy). I believe that doing sports makes us (10)____ (strong) and happier.
sets.explain_zh: (1) important for/to；(2) regularly 副词；(3) which 指物；(4) relaxing 形容词；(5) faster 比较级；(6) held 过去；(7) to watch 目的；(8) where 引导地点(race中)；(9) tired but happy；(10) stronger 比较级。

sets.passage: My mother loves growing flowers on our balcony. She has more than twenty (1)____ (pot) of plants there. Every morning she waters them carefully (2)____ they can grow well. 'Plants are living things,' she always (3)____ (say) to me. In spring, the roses are the (4)____ (colourful) of all. Last week, one little plant (5)____ (begin) to die, and my mother looked worried. She moved it into the sun, and slowly it became green (6)____. Now I understand that caring (7)____ a plant needs patience. My mother says that growing flowers (8)____ (teach) us to be gentle. When I grow up, I (9)____ have a big garden of my own. I will fill it (10)____ beautiful flowers.
sets.explain_zh: (1) twenty pots 复数；(2) so (that) 目的；(3) she says 主谓一致；(4) most colourful 最高级；(5) began 过去；(6) green again；(7) care for；(8) growing flowers teaches 动名词主语；(9) 将来 will；(10) fill with。

sets.passage: Last month, my class (1)____ (visit) an old farm in the countryside. The farmer, an old man (2)____ smile was very kind, welcomed us warmly. He showed us how vegetables (3)____ (grow) from tiny seeds. We learned that farmers get up (4)____ (early) than most people. Each of us (5)____ (be) given a chance to feed the chickens. It was much (6)____ (dirty) than I expected, but also great fun. The farmer said that food does not come (7)____ supermarkets, but from hard work. 'Never waste your meals,' he told us (8)____ (serious). On the way home, we talked about (9)____ we had learned. That trip taught me (10)____ (respect) every farmer.
sets.explain_zh: (1) last month 过去 visited；(2) whose smile；(3) how vegetables grow；(4) earlier 比较级；(5) each of us was 主谓一致；(6) dirtier 比较级；(7) come from；(8) seriously 副词；(9) what 引导宾语从句；(10) teach sb to respect。

sets.passage: Music plays an important part in my life. I (1)____ (learn) to play the piano for five years now. At first, it was difficult, and I almost gave (2)____. But my teacher encouraged me, and I kept (3)____ (practise) every day. Now playing the piano is one of the (4)____ (great) joys in my life. Music helps me relax (5)____ I feel tired or sad. My sister sings (6)____ (beautiful), and sometimes we perform together. Last summer, we (7)____ (take) part in a school concert. The audience clapped (8)____ loudly that we played another song. I believe music is a language (9)____ everyone can understand. It brings people (10)____ no matter where they are from.
sets.explain_zh: (1) for five years 现在完成 have learned；(2) give up；(3) keep practising；(4) one of the greatest 最高级；(5) when 时间；(6) beautifully 副词；(7) last summer 过去 took；(8) so...that；(9) that/which 指物；(10) bring people together。

sets.passage: In our school, we have a special rule: every student must join (1)____ club. There are many clubs, such as art, science and (2)____ (history). I chose the writing club because I love (3)____ (tell) stories. Our teacher says that good writing (4)____ (need) practice and patience. Last term, I wrote a short story, and it (5)____ (choose) for the school magazine. I felt happier than (6)____ before. The club has also helped me make many new (7)____ (friend). We often share our ideas (8)____ each other after class. I think joining a club is a wonderful way (9)____ (discover) your interests. It makes school life (10)____ (rich) and more colourful.
sets.explain_zh: (1) join a club 不定冠词；(2) history 不可数；(3) love telling/to tell；(4) good writing needs 主谓一致；(5) was chosen 过去被动；(6) happier than ever；(7) many friends 复数；(8) share with；(9) a way to discover；(10) richer 比较级。
